title: University Registration

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: صَبَاحُ الْخَيْرِ، أُرِيدُ التَّسْجِيلَ فِي الْجَامِعَةِ لِلْعَامِ الدِّرَاسِيِّ الْقَادِمِ.
lines.bs: Dobro jutro, želim se upisati na univerzitet za narednu akademsku godinu.
lines.en: Good morning, I want to register at the university for the coming academic year.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: صَبَاحُ النُّورِ! أَهْلًا بِكَ. أَيُّ كُلِّيَّةٍ تُرِيدُ الاِلْتِحَاقَ بِهَا؟
lines.bs: Dobro jutro! Dobrodošli. Koji fakultet želite upisati?
lines.en: Good morning! Welcome. Which faculty do you want to join?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: أُرِيدُ الاِلْتِحَاقَ بِكُلِّيَّةِ الْهَنْدَسَةِ، تَخَصُّصُ الْحَاسُوبِ.
lines.bs: Želim upisati Tehnički fakultet, smjer računarstvo.
lines.en: I want to join the Engineering Faculty, specialization in computer science.

lines.speaker: B
lines.bs: Odlično. Koji dokumenti su potrebni za upis?
lines.en: Excellent. What documents are required for registration?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: هَذَا مَا أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَعْرِفَهُ. مَا الْوَثَائِقُ الَّتِي يَجِبُ أَنْ أُحْضِرَهَا؟
lines.bs: To upravo želim znati. Koje dokumente trebam donijeti?
lines.en: That is exactly what I want to know. What documents must I bring?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: تَحْتَاجُ إِلَى شَهَادَةِ الثَّانَوِيَّةِ وَصُورَةٍ عَنْ هُوِيَّتِكَ وَاثْنَتَيْنِ مِنَ الصُّوَرِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ.
lines.bs: Trebate svjedočanstvo srednje škole, kopiju lične karte i dvije fotografije.
lines.en: You need a high school certificate, a copy of your ID, and two personal photographs.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: فَهِمْتُ. وَمَا مِقْدَارُ الرُّسُومِ الدِّرَاسِيَّةِ فِي السَّنَةِ؟
lines.en: I understand. What is the amount of the annual tuition fees?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: الرُّسُومُ الدِّرَاسِيَّةُ ثَلَاثَةُ آلَافِ دُولَارٍ فِي السَّنَةِ، وَيُمْكِنُ الدَّفْعُ عَلَى قِسْطَيْنِ.
lines.bs: Školarina je tri hiljade dolara godišnje, i može se platiti u dvije rate.
lines.en: The tuition fees are three thousand dollars per year, and can be paid in two installments.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: هَلْ تُوجَدُ مَنَحٌ دِرَاسِيَّةٌ لِلطُّلَّابِ الْمُتَفَوِّقِينَ؟
lines.bs: Postoje li stipendije za odlične studente?
lines.en: Are there scholarships for excellent students?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، تُوجَدُ مَنَحٌ جُزْئِيَّةٌ وَكَامِلَةٌ. يُمْكِنُكَ التَّقَدُّمُ لِلْمَنْحَةِ بَعْدَ التَّسْجِيلِ.
lines.bs: Da, postoje djelimične i pune stipendije. Možete aplicirati za stipendiju nakon upisa.
lines.en: Yes, there are partial and full scholarships. You can apply for a scholarship after registration.

lines.speaker: A
lines.bs: Koji je krajnji rok za upis?
lines.en: What is the deadline for registration?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: آخِرُ مَوْعِدٍ لِلتَّسْجِيلِ هُوَ نِهَايَةُ شَهْرِ أَغُسْطُسَ. لَا تَتَأَخَّرْ!
lines.bs: Krajnji rok za upis je kraj avgusta. Nemojte kasniti!
lines.en: The registration deadline is the end of August. Do not be late!

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: And when will I receive the student ID card?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: سَتَحْصُلُ عَلَى بِطَاقَةِ الطَّالِبِ فِي أَوَّلِ أُسْبُوعٍ مِنَ الدِّرَاسَةِ. مَرْحَبًا بِكَ فِي جَامِعَتِنَا!
lines.bs: Dobit ćete studentsku iskaznicu u prvoj sedmici studija. Dobrodošli na naš univerzitet!
lines.en: You will receive the student ID card in the first week of studies. Welcome to our university!

grammarFocus: imperfect verb with تَحْتَاجُ and future tense with سَـ
